violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Sani buckets in kitchen and at dish pit were found with less 200ppm Quat solutions. -Sani Bucket at espresso station found at greater than 500ppm Quat. *Sani buckets should be maintained at 200-400ppm Quat per label instructions.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Rough/worn cement counter at espresso machine. -Cloth mat used below extra coffee cup storage at coffee station. -Damaged shelf bracket in one upright freezer in dry storage building.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Frost at small chest freezer in dry storage building. -Stain/splatter/odor at sides and gasket of tan refrigerator in dry storage building. -Residue at edges of bottom shelf of stainless prep table at the kitchen area. -Some frost build up at interior of under counter refrigerator used for frozen dessert. -Storage rack used for coffee cups at coffee station has dust/debris residue.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. -Ice in hand sink basin at coffee station (appears to be used as a dump sink).

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 41F or below during display or service. -2 cream cheese spreads being stored above "cold line" at kitchen make table found with temperatures of 46F. *Rearranged so items are below cold line, also adjusted bread in bottom of unit to ensure proper air flow at left side of unit.
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
